betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Singularity§f

§aA contained gravitational anomaly — used for DFC cores and the ultimate armor!§f

§bSingularities§f are contained gravitational anomalies created through exotic matter compression. They serve as core components for the §bDFC§f and are required for the §bDNT Nano Suit§f.

§6Types§f:
§b• §bContained Counter-Resonant Singularity§f (hbm:singularity_counter_resonant) — the standard type
§b• §bVibrant Singularity§f — more powerful variant for DFC cores

§6Production§f:
Singularities are produced through specific compression and containment processes involving exotic matter, including §bEuphemium§f.

§6Uses§f:
§b• §bDFC Core§f — vibrant singularity is a core type for the DFC (multiplier: §e500×§f)
§b• §bDNT Nano Suit§f — requires a singularity for crafting
§b• §bSpark Singularity§f — required for the DNT Nano Suit helmet

§eTip§f: Start with a counter-resonant singularity for basic needs. Upgrade to vibrant singularity for DFC power generation. The singularity type directly affects your DFC's power output multiplier.
